title: Foreign students: register for health insurance online!
content:
Foreign students: register for health insurance online!
Are you a foreign student from a country that has signed a social security agreement with Québec? In most cases, your registration for health insurance and the extension of your eligibility are done entirely online. Here’s how to do it in 2 easy steps.
1
Gather the mandatory documents
Remember, you must obtain certain documents
before
you leave for Québec!
Attestation of
coverage under your country’s social security plan
Attestation of
full-time enrolment in a Québec educational institution
(or a traineeship or research agreement, as applicable)
Québec Acceptance Certificate (
CAQ
) or Attestation of issuance of your
CAQ
, confirming that you are entitled to pursue studies in Québec (for a stay of more than 6 months)
Study permit
issued by Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada or
the identity page of your passport
if you do not have a study permit
To avoid delaying the processing of your application, please pay particular attention to the
legibility
of the information on the documents you send us.
2
Apply online
You must apply
after
you arrive in Québec.
Complete all of the fields
Attach the requested documents
Send your application
You will receive an email acknowledging receipt of your application and informing you of the processing time. During peak periods, processing times may be longer.
All done! Your letter of eligibility and Health Insurance Card will be then sent to you separately, to the address on the form.
Register or re-register for health insurance
How did we do?
Was the information on this page useful to you?
Yes
No
Any comments?
(optional)
Do not include any personal information. You will not receive any reply.
Leave this field blank
